title: L4 trust.force_grant Payload
description: Force-grant exception emitted when trust_grant --force overrides cooldown. cycle-098 Sprint 4C — FR-L4-8. force-grant is a protected-class operation per protected-class-router; recordable but never silent.

reason.description: REQUIRED for force-grant; auditor-facing rationale. No default.

cooldown_remaining_seconds_at_grant.description: Cooldown seconds remaining when force-grant fired. 0 means cooldown had already elapsed (operator chose to use --force redundantly).
